140 _39OD EXPRSN_DSCHRG_CD (39Od) Communication - Expression: Discharge CHAR 2 A score indicating the patient's ability for expression at discharge. Expression includes clear vocal or non-vocal expression of language. This item includes either intelligible speech or clear expression of language using writing or a communication device. 01 = Helper - Complete Dependence/Total Assistance (Subject less than 25%), 02 =
